title: Winner of the Soldotna/Anchorage Info meeting KBBC trip announced!
summary: Congratulations to Shareholder Karen S. Chernikoff! Karen is the winner of the Kodiak Brown Bear Center trip for two giveaway for our Soldotna/Anchorage Informational meetings. All the Shareholders and Descendants who attended the Anchorage and Soldotna meetings were put in for the drawing. Sharehol...
